initiatives.name: Milwaukee Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots network coordinating mutual aid and community support initiatives in Milwaukee. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and neighborhood solidarity while building sustainable networks of care and support through community organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Milwaukee Community Fridge
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing free food access and community support through public refrigerators in Milwaukee. They coordinate food distribution, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through food justice, community care, and creating spaces for sustainable food access.

initiatives.name: Milwaukee Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots network fostering community solidarity and direct support across Milwaukee through mutual aid organizing. They coordinate resource sharing, emergency assistance, and community care while building networks of support through local organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Milwaukee Community Care and Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Milwaukee Community Care and Mutual Aid was organized to provide collaborative care and information to community members who may be most affected during these uncertain times.

initiatives.name: Black and Pink Milwaukee
initiatives.description: We are a collective in Milwaukee, WI organizing from an abolitionist feminist praxis to support currently and formerly incarcerated people who identify across the LGBTQ+ spectrum and/or living with HIV/AIDS.

initiatives.name: Cooperation Milwaukee
initiatives.description: Libsoc counter-power organization; rank & file unions, worker-owned cooperatives, community assemblies, mutual aid in so called Milwaukee

initiatives.name: Sun-Seeker MKE
initiatives.description: A Black & Trans abolitionist collective co-conspiring to build holistic safety & security for Black communities, Trans comrades & M.A.G.E.S.

initiatives.name: Butterfly Collective MKE
initiatives.description: A platform that seeks to uplift and support Black and Brown Trans & Gender nonconforming folks in Milwaukee, WI

initiatives.name: Milwaukee Autonomous Tenants Union
initiatives.description: Fighting for the human right to housing and defending tenants' right to dignified and safe homes.
